summary: Frontend testing complete for Saunas page heater filter and model comparison dropdowns. All 5 requested features verified working correctly: (1) Saunas page heater filter hides sauna grid and shows only heaters section, (2) All 5 category filters (All Saunas, Outdoor, Indoor, Infrared, Heaters) are clickable and functional, (3) Non-heater filters show both sauna grid AND heaters section, (4) Grand River model comparison dropdown works - selecting different models updates comparison data, (5) Dynasty model comparison dropdown works - selecting different models updates comparison data with visual indicators.
passed_tests: Saunas page (/saunas) loads with data-testid='saunas-page'
All 5 filter buttons present: filter-all, filter-outdoor, filter-indoor, filter-infrared, filter-heaters
'All Saunas' filter is active by default (red background bg-[#B91C1C])
Sauna grid visible initially when 'All Saunas' filter active
Heaters section visible initially when 'All Saunas' filter active
Clicking 'Heaters' filter activates it (red background)
Heaters filter hides sauna grid (0 product cards visible)
Heaters filter shows only Sauna Heaters section (Cozy, Finsauna, HUUM heaters)
Clicking 'All Saunas' restores both sauna grid and heaters section
'Outdoor' filter clickable and activates correctly
'Indoor' filter clickable and activates correctly
'Infrared' filter clickable and activates correctly
Heaters section remains visible for all non-heater filters
Grand River product page (/products/gr-chariton-2) loads with data-testid='product-detail-page'
Grand River compare select dropdown found with data-testid='grand-river-compare-select'
Grand River dropdown has 17 options (16 other models + placeholder)
Grand River dropdown default shows related model (gr-chariton-1)
Selecting gr-chesapeake-2 updates dropdown value and shows Chesapeake comparison
Selecting gr-saginaw-2 updates dropdown value and shows Saginaw comparison
Grand River comparison shows specs: Dimensions, Seats, Jets, Seating, Electrical
Dynasty product page (/products/ds-paradise-bay-iii) loads correctly
Dynasty compare select dropdown found with data-testid='dynasty-compare-select'
Dynasty dropdown has 26 options (25 other models + placeholder)
Selecting ds-palm-island-ii updates comparison with visual indicators (↑ for more seats, ↓ for fewer jets)
Selecting ds-coconut-bay-ii updates comparison correctly
Dynasty comparison shows specs: Dimensions, Seats, Jets, Seating, Electrical, Water Capacity
Dynasty Quick Overview table shows all models with Model, Seats, Jets, Seating, Price, Action columns
critical_code_review_comments: SaunasPage.jsx correctly implements isHeaterFilter logic at line 11 to conditionally hide sauna grid
Filter buttons properly use data-testid attributes for testing (filter-all, filter-outdoor, etc.)
ProductDetailPage.jsx Grand River comparison at line 880 with data-testid='grand-river-compare-select'
ProductDetailPage.jsx Dynasty comparison at line 965 with data-testid='dynasty-compare-select'
Comparison dropdowns properly update selectedCompareModel state on change
Dynasty comparison includes visual indicators (↑/↓ arrows with color coding) for spec differences
seed_data_creation: N/A - All product data hardcoded in frontend/src/data/products.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: (1) Saunas page heater filter at /saunas - clicking 'Heaters' hides sauna grid and shows only heaters section with 6 heater products. (2) All 5 category filters functional with proper active state styling. (3) Grand River model comparison dropdown at /products/gr-chariton-2 (or any gr-* product) - 16 comparable models, dropdown updates comparison data. (4) Dynasty model comparison dropdown at /products/ds-paradise-bay-iii (or any ds-* product) - 25 comparable models, dropdown updates comparison with visual indicators. Note: gr-heritage, gr-denali, gr-sequoia, gr-jasper, gr-vanguard product IDs do NOT exist - actual Grand River product IDs are gr-chariton-1, gr-chariton-2, gr-chesapeake-1, gr-chesapeake-2, gr-saginaw-1, gr-saginaw-2, etc.
